description: owine/* baseline — supply-chain hardened defaults. Pin everything, soak releases, escalate CVEs.

packageRules.description: Major bumps — separate PR per package, 7-day soak, manual review required
Pin Docker image and GitHub Action digests so a re-tagged image/action can't slip in
docker-compose: bump tags but never pin digests — keeps compose files readable for humans editing them by hand

Node version pins use LTS-aware versioning — Renovate's 'node' versioning scheme tracks LTS lines (22, 24, 26, ...) and skips Current/odd-numbered releases (23, 25, 27, ...). LTS-to-LTS major bumps still come as separate manual-review PRs via the major-bump rule above.

customManagers.description: Bump version literals in GitHub Actions workflow files annotated with `# renovate: datasource=X depName=Y` hints. Supports trailing-comment style (hint after value, same line) and leading-comment style (hint on the line directly above value). INVARIANT — do not regress: every inter-field separator below MUST use horizontal-whitespace classes (`[ \t]` / `[ \t]+`), never `\s` or `\s+`. `\s` matches `\n`, which lets a value bind to the *next* block's hint and causes cross-attribution bugs (see PR #4). DRY note: the two patterns share textually identical metadata-tail and value subpatterns — JSON has no variable substitution and Renovate's RE2 engine has no subpattern references, so they cannot be factored out at the config layer; any edit to one pattern MUST be applied character-for-character to the other. Reaches places the github-actions manager can't natively (strategy.matrix arrays, run-step args, env defaults) without per-repo regex config.
